name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-ssl

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-ssl
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Ssl SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Ssl SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-ssl
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common ssl
```

  ECC\u65F6\uFF0C\u6B64\u53C2\u6570\u5FC5\u586B"
param _CsrKeyPassword: "CSR \u7684\u52A0\u5BC6\u5BC6\u7801\u3002"
param _DeleteDnsAutoRecord: "\u7B7E\u53D1\u540E\u662F\u5426\u5220\u9664\u81EA\u52A8\

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.DvAuthMethod
documentation:
验证方式：DNS_AUTO = 自动DNS验证，DNS = 手动DNS验证，FILE = 文件验证。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.DomainName
documentation:
域名。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.ProjectId
documentation:
项目 ID。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.PackageType
documentation:
证书类型，目前仅支持类型83。83 = TrustAsia C1 DV Free。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.ContactEmail
documentation:
邮箱。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.ContactPhone
documentation:
手机。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.ValidityPeriod
documentation:
有效期，默认3个月，目前仅支持3个月。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.CsrEncryptAlgo
documentation:
加密算法，支持 RSA及ECC。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.CsrKeyParameter
documentation:
密钥对参数，RSA仅支持2048。ECC仅支持prime256v1。加密算法选择ECC时，此参数必填
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.CsrKeyPassword
documentation:
CSR 的加密密码。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.Alias
documentation:
备注名称。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.OldCertificateId
documentation:
原证书 ID，用于重新申请。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.PackageId
documentation:
权益包ID，用于免费证书扩容包使用
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.DeleteDnsAutoRecord
documentation:
签发后是否删除自动域名验证记录， 默认为否；仅域名为DNS_AUTO验证类型支持传参
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ApplyCertificateRequest.DnsNames
documentation:
域名数组（多域名证书可以上传）。
\:rtype: list of str

documentation:
---
param _OrderId: "CA\u673A\u6784\u4FA7\u8BA2\u5355\u53F7\u3002"
param _RequestId: "\u552F\u4E00\u8BF7\u6C42 ID\uFF0C\u7531\u670D\u52A1\u7AEF\u751F\
  \u6210\uFF0C\u6BCF\u6B21\u8BF7\u6C42\u90FD\u4F1A\u8FD4\u56DE\uFF08\u82E5\u8BF7\u6C42\
  \u56E0\u5176\u4ED6\u539F\u56E0\u672A\u80FD\u62B5\u8FBE\u670D\u52A1\u7AEF\uFF0C\u5219\
  \u8BE5\u6B21\u8BF7\u6C42\u4E0D\u4F1A\u83B7\u5F97 RequestId\uFF09\u3002\u5B9A\u4F4D\
  \u95EE\u9898\u65F6\u9700\u8981\u63D0\u4F9B\u8BE5\u6B21\u8BF7\u6C42\u7684 RequestId\u3002"
param _Status: "\u8BC1\u4E66\u72B6\u6001\uFF1A0 = \u5BA1\u6838\u4E2D\uFF0C1 = \u5DF2\
  \u901A\u8FC7\uFF0C2 = \u5BA1\u6838\u5931\u8D25\uFF0C3 = \u5DF2\u8FC7\u671F\uFF0C\
  4 = \u5DF2\u6DFB\u52A0DNS\u8BB0\u5F55\uFF0C5 = \u4F01\u4E1A\u8BC1\u4E66\uFF0C\u5F85\
  \u63D0\u4EA4\uFF0C6 = \u8BA2\u5355\u53D6\u6D88\u4E2D\uFF0C7 = \u5DF2\u53D6\u6D88\
  \uFF0C8 = \u5DF2\u63D0\u4EA4\u8D44\u6599\uFF0C \u5F85\u4E0A\u4F20\u786E\u8BA4\u51FD\
  \uFF0C9 = \u8BC1\u4E66\u540A\u9500\u4E2D\uFF0C10 = \u5DF2\u540A\u9500\uFF0C11 =\
  \ \u91CD\u9881\u53D1\u4E2D\uFF0C12 = \u5F85\u4E0A\u4F20\u540A\u9500\u786E\u8BA4\u51FD\
  \uFF0C13 = \u514D\u8D39\u8BC1\u4E66\u5F85\u63D0\u4EA4\u8D44\u6599\u3002"
type OrderId: str
type RequestId: str
type Status: int
---

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.CommitCertificateInformationResponse.OrderId
documentation:
CA机构侧订单号。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.CommitCertificateInformationResponse.Status
documentation:
证书状态：0 = 审核中，1 = 已通过，2 = 审核失败，3 = 已过期，4 = 已添加DNS记录，5 = 企业证书，待提交，6 = 订单取消中，7 = 已取消，8 = 已提交资料， 待上传确认函，9 = 证书吊销中，10 = 已吊销，11 = 重颁发中，12 = 待上传吊销确认函，13 = 免费证书待提交资料。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.CommitCertificateInformationResponse.RequestId
documentation:
唯一请求 ID，由服务端生成，每次请求都会返回（若请求因其他原因未能抵达服务端，则该次请求不会获得 RequestId）。定位问题时需要提供该次请求的 RequestId。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.DeleteCertificateRequest.IsCheckResource
documentation:

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.DescribeCertificatesRequest.Offset
documentation:

documentation:
按到期时间排序：DESC = 降序， ASC = 升序。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.DescribeCertificatesRequest.CertificateStatus
documentation:
证书状态：0 = 审核中，1 = 已通过，2 = 审核失败，3 = 已过期，4 = 已添加DNS记录，5 = 企业证书，待提交，6 = 订单取消中，7 = 已取消，8 = 已提交资料， 待上传确认函，9 = 证书吊销中，10 = 已吊销，11 = 重颁发中，12 = 待上传吊销确认函，13 = 免费证书待提交资料。

classes.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ReplaceCertificateRequest

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.ReplaceCertificateRequest.__init__
documentation:
> ```
> param _CertificateId
>
> 证书 ID。
>
> type CertificateId
>
> str
>
> param _ValidType
>
> 验证类型：DNS_AUTO = 自动DNS验证（仅支持在腾讯云解析且解析状态正常的域名使用该验证类型），DNS = 手动DNS验证，FILE = 文件验证。
>
> type ValidType
>
> str
>
> param _CsrType
>
> 类型，默认 Original。可选项：Original = 原证书 CSR，Upload = 手动上传，Online = 在线生成。
>
> type CsrType
>
> str
>
> param _CsrContent
>
> CSR 内容。
>
> type CsrContent
>
> str
>
> param _CsrkeyPassword
>
> KEY 密码。
>
> type CsrkeyPassword
>
> str
>
> param _Reason
>
> 重颁发原因。
>
> type Reason
>
> str
>
> param _CertCSREncryptAlgo
>
> CSR加密方式，可选：RSA、ECC、SM2
> ```

（CsrType为Online才可选）， 默认为RSA
: ```
  type CertCSREncryptAlgo

  str

  param _CertCSRKeyParameter

  CSR加密参数，CsrEncryptAlgo为RSA时， 可选2048、4096等默认为2048；CsrEncryptAlgo为ECC时，可选prime256v1，secp384r1等，默认为prime256v1;

  type CertCSRKeyParameter

  str
  ```

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.OldCertificateId
documentation:
一键更新原证书ID， 查询绑定该证书的云资源然后进行证书更新
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.ResourceTypes
documentation:
需要部署的资源类型，参数值可选（小写）：clb、cdn、waf、live、ddos、teo、apigateway、vod、tke、tcb、tse、cos
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.CertificateId
documentation:
一键更新新证书ID，不传则证书公钥和私钥必传
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.ResourceTypesRegions
documentation:
云资源需要部署的地域列表，支持地域的云资源类型必传，如：clb、tke、apigateway、waf、tcb、tse等
\:rtype: list of ResourceTypeRegions

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.CertificatePublicKey
documentation:
证书公钥， 若上传证书公钥， 则CertificateId不用传
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.CertificatePrivateKey
documentation:
证书私钥，若上传证书公钥， 则CertificateId不用传
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.ExpiringNotificationSwitch
documentation:
旧证书是否忽略到期提醒 0:不忽略通知。1:忽略通知，忽略OldCertificateId到期提醒
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.Repeatable
documentation:
相同的证书是否允许重复上传，若选择上传证书， 则可以配置该参数
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.AllowDownload
documentation:
是否允许下载，若选择上传证书， 则可以配置该参数
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.Tags
documentation:
标签列表，若选择上传证书， 则可以配置该参数
\:rtype: list of Tags

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UpdateCertificateInstanceRequest.ProjectId
documentation:
项目 ID，若选择上传证书， 则可以配置该参数
\:rtype: int
UpdateCertificateInstance请求参数结构体

  \u8BC1\u4E66\uFF1B false\uFF1A\u4E0D\u5141\u8BB8\u4E0A\u4F20\u76F8\u540C\u6307\u7EB9\
  \u7684\u8BC1\u4E66\uFF1B \u9ED8\u8BA4\u503C\uFF1Atrue"

type CertificateType: str
type CertificateUse: str

type Repeatable: bool
type Tags: list of Tags
---

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UploadCertificateRequest.CertificatePublicKey
documentation:
证书内容。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UploadCertificateRequest.CertificatePrivateKey
documentation:
私钥内容，证书类型为 SVR 时必填，为 CA 时可不填。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UploadCertificateRequest.CertificateType
documentation:
证书类型，默认 SVR。CA = CA证书，SVR = 服务器证书。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UploadCertificateRequest.Alias
documentation:
备注名称。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UploadCertificateRequest.ProjectId
documentation:
项目 ID。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UploadCertificateRequest.CertificateUse
documentation:
证书用途/证书来源。“CLB，CDN，WAF，LIVE，DDOS”
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UploadCertificateRequest.Tags
documentation:
标签列表
\:rtype: list of Tags

methods.name: tencentcloud.ssl.v20191205.models.UploadCertificateRequest.Repeatable
documentation:
相同的证书是否允许重复上传； true：允许上传相同指纹的证书； false：不允许上传相同指纹的证书； 默认值：true
\:rtype: bool
